---
format: html
title: get_continent_id_from_scale_id()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>get_continent_id_from_scale_id</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Get Continent ID from Scale ID</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Resolves the continental parent identifier for a spatial
&lsquo;scale_id' using the project&rsquo;s spatial grid CSV catalogue.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>get_continent_id_from_scale_id(
  scale_id,
  file = here::here("Data/Input/spatial_grid.csv")
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="scale_id">scale_id</code></td>
<td>
<p>A single non-empty character string identifying the spatial
unit whose 'continent_id' should be returned.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="file">file</code></td>
<td>
<p>Path to the spatial grid CSV catalogue file.
Default: 'here::here(&quot;Data/Input/spatial_grid.csv&quot;)'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>The function validates the inputs, reads the spatial grid CSV,
finds the row matching 'scale_id', and returns its
'continent_id'. The function errors when the file is not a
readable CSV, when required columns are absent, when the
'scale_id' is absent or duplicated, or when the matched row has
a missing 'continent_id' value.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A single non-empty character string containing the 'continent_id'
for the supplied 'scale_id'.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>get_scale_id_from_store, get_spatial_window
</p>


<h3>Examples</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>get_continent_id_from_scale_id(
  scale_id = "eu_r005",
  file = here::here("Data/Input/spatial_grid.csv")
)
</code></pre>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
